meaning: adj.纪念碑的,纪念物的,不朽的,非常的
examples: We have a monumental task ahead of us.
It seems like an act of monumental folly.
I take no real interest in monumental sculpture.
Among them was apostle Peter, whose tomb lies beneath the monumental St Peter's Basilica (Basilica di San Pietro).
This is a monumental accomplishment at a moment when cultural loyalty is extremely fickle.
